title: paphiopedilum × ashburtoniae
intro: Paphiopedilum × ashburtoniae, also known as Ashburton's Venus slipper, is a rare and exotic orchid species that is a hybrid of two Paphiopedilum species. Traditionally used in folk medicine, the Ashburton's Venus slipper is said to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Consuming the plant or using its herbal preparations may offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating digestive issues. However, the specific herbal preparations and recommended dosages for using Ashburton's Venus slipper require further research and medical guidance due to its limited study and potential toxicity.
